description: Anima txt2img default aesthetic LoRA workflow with Anima Layer Replay Patcher, FLSampler, TeaCache and RTX VSR 2x upscale. Experimental comparison workflow; do not use as default until validated.

fls_fovea_strength.description: Optional FLSampler texture strength. Default 3.0 follows the author default/recommended starting value; only pass when the user explicitly asks to tune FLSampler texture/detail.

fls_sharpness.description: Optional FLSampler local contrast/sharpness. Default 0.5 follows the author default; only pass when the user explicitly asks to tune FLSampler sharpness.

fls_mask_inertia.description: Optional FLSampler focus mask inertia. Default 0.85 follows the author default; only pass when the user explicitly asks to tune FLSampler focus stability.

rtx_vsr_quality.description: RTX VSR quality: LOW, MEDIUM, HIGH, ULTRA. Scale is fixed to 2x in workflow JSON.

teacache_threshold.description: TeaCache threshold. Default 0.15 is the conservative Anima setting; lower values are safer.

teacache_adaptive_mode.description: Enable TeaCache adaptive mode. Default true.

teacache_cache_device.description: TeaCache cache device: cuda or cpu. Default cuda.

teacache_version.description: AnimaTeaCache version enum: v1 (Legacy Fast) or v2 (Standard Precise). Default is v1 (Legacy Fast); do not pass short values v1/v2.

anima_booster_sage_attention.description: Optional AnimaBoosterLoader SageAttention mode: disabled, auto, triton, sageattn_qk_int8_pv_fp16_cuda, sageattn_qk_int8_pv_fp8_cuda. Default disabled; only pass when user explicitly requests node-level control.

anima_booster_torch_compile.description: Optional AnimaBoosterLoader torch.compile toggle. Default false; only pass when user explicitly requests compile/JIT warmup behavior.

anima_enhancer_enable_replay.description: Optional Anima Layer Replay Patcher toggle. Default true for this comparison workflow; only change when user explicitly asks.

anima_enhancer_block_indices.description: Optional Anima Layer Replay block list. Default 3,4,5 follows the author recommended starting setting; only change when user explicitly asks.

anima_enhancer_denoise_start_pct.description: Optional Anima Layer Replay start percentage. Default 0.50; only change when user explicitly asks.

anima_enhancer_denoise_end_pct.description: Optional Anima Layer Replay end percentage. Default 1.00; only change when user explicitly asks.

anima_enhancer_enable_spectrum.description: Optional Spectrum acceleration toggle. Default false for quality comparison; only enable when user explicitly asks to test Spectrum.

anima_enhancer_spectrum_w.description: Optional Spectrum blend weight. Default 0.2; only pass when Spectrum is explicitly requested.

anima_enhancer_spectrum_m.description: Optional Spectrum Chebyshev order. Default 16; only pass when Spectrum is explicitly requested.

anima_enhancer_spectrum_lam.description: Optional Spectrum regularization lambda. Default 0.5; only pass when Spectrum is explicitly requested.

anima_enhancer_spectrum_warmup_steps.description: Optional Spectrum warmup steps. Default 6; only pass when Spectrum is explicitly requested.

anima_enhancer_spectrum_window_size.description: Optional Spectrum window size. Default 2; only pass when Spectrum is explicitly requested.

anima_enhancer_spectrum_flex_window.description: Optional Spectrum flex window. Default 0.0; only pass when Spectrum is explicitly requested.
